# CFStreamErrorHTTP.badURL

**Case**

The URL is not properly formatted.

## Declaration

```swift
case badURL
```

## Constants

- **CFStreamErrorHTTP.parseFailure**: A parsing error occurred while an incoming message was being deserialized and appended to a message object. The headers of the incoming message may be formatted improperly.
- **CFStreamErrorHTTP.redirectionLoop**: A redirection loop has been detected.
